enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Edho Ninaivugal?

The song Edho Ninaivugal reflects on memories and emotions, evoking a sense of nostalgia and longing.

In which movie is the song Edho Ninaivugal featured?

The song is featured in the movie Agal Vilakku.

Who are the singers of Edho Ninaivugal?

The song is sung by the legendary singers K. J. Yesudas and S. P. Shailaja.

Who composed the music for Edho Ninaivugal?

The music for Edho Ninaivugal was composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Edho Ninaivugal released?

The song was released on December 4, 1979.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Agal Vilakku, the song Edho Ninaivugal beautifully encapsulates the feelings of nostalgia and longing. It portrays the protagonist's reflections on past memories and emotions, creating a melancholic yet romantic atmosphere. The soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics, evokes deep sentiments of love and yearning. This classic track remains a timeless favorite, resonating with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of reminiscence.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Edho Ninaivugal from the timeless classic Agal Vilakku. This melodious track, featuring the soulful voices of K. J. Yesudas and S. P. Shailaja, captures the essence of nostalgia and romance. Let the beautiful lyrics and Ilaiyaraaja's mesmerizing composition take you on a journey through memories and emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Some thoughts and dreams bloom in the mind, like the Kaveri river flowing, it is seen every day.
Thoughts and dreams bloom in the mind, like the Kaveri river flowing, it is seen every day.
In the changing world, I too need to change, only then will the time be right.
The sky and everywhere, my love song should live on forever.
The time when all troubles are resolved, you are the one I need, the time I need.
Some thoughts and dreams bloom in the mind, like the Kaveri river flowing, it is seen every day.
I see the bond of my own family, even now it brings joy.
Each day is a color I see, my heart feels happiness.
In the wind, my love speaks, wherever I go, it stays with me.
Some thoughts and dreams bloom in the mind, like the Kaveri river flowing, it is seen every day.
